situationalContext: Setal, in guest quarters, requests water from the computer.

computerReply: This system is calibrated to the Celsius metric system.
situationalContext: Setal, in guest quarters, specifies a temperature for his water, which the computer cannot understand.

computerReply: Two hours, twenty two minute delay from time of transmission
situationalContext: Picard asks the computer about the delay of a priority message from Starfleet.
